columns.extraction_plan: The document mentions "PSA progression (biochemical failure)" as an outcome (page 3, 4), which is part of the composite endpoint "failure-free survival" (Figure 4C, 4D). However, the median time specifically for "PSA progression" (TTPSA) for the treatment group is not reported in the text, tables, or figures.

The document mentions "PSA progression (biochemical failure)" as an outcome (page 3, 4), which is part of the composite endpoint "failure-free survival" (Figure 4C, 4D). However, the median time specifically for "PSA progression" (TTPSA) for the control group is not reported in the text, tables, or figures.
